title: PwD - Product Image Gallery Interaction - Functional Test Plan (33 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-82: PwD - Product Image Gallery Interaction. Validates main image display, thumbnail interaction, carousel navigation, gallery capacity, demo video playback in popup, aspect ratio consistency, and responsive gallery behavior on the wheelchair-16-03 product.

testCases.title: Main product image is visible at top of gallery
steps: Log in and navigate to wheelchair product.
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in and on the wheelchair product page.
expectedResults: Main product image is visible at top of gallery.

testCases.title: Main image has valid src attribute
steps: Verify main image src is a valid URL.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Main image src is a valid URL.

testCases.title: Main image has alt text
steps: Verify main image has alt attribute.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Main image has an alt attribute.

testCases.title: Main image is rendered at prominent size
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Image is at least 200x100px.

testCases.title: Thumbnail images are displayed below main image
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Thumbnail images are visible below main image.

testCases.title: At least one thumbnail is present
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: At least one thumbnail is present.

testCases.title: First thumbnail is active by default
steps: Verify first thumb has active state.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: First thumbnail has active state.

testCases.title: Clicking second thumbnail updates active state
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Second thumbnail becomes active after clicking.

testCases.title: Clicking thumbnail updates main image src
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Main image src changes after clicking a different thumbnail.

testCases.title: Clicking each thumbnail sequentially works
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Each thumbnail becomes active when clicked sequentially.

testCases.title: Next button is visible when multiple images exist
steps: Verify Next button or multiple thumbnails present.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Next button or multiple thumbnails are present.

testCases.title: Clicking Next advances to next slide
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Slide advances after clicking Next or second thumbnail.

testCases.title: Previous button navigates back
testCases.preconditions: User advanced the gallery slide.
expectedResults: Previous slide is shown after going back.

testCases.title: Gallery counter updates on navigation
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Gallery counter text changes on navigation.

testCases.title: Carousel wraps or stops at boundaries
testCases.preconditions: User is on the last slide.
expectedResults: Carousel wraps to first or stays at last.

testCases.title: Gallery has multiple slides
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Gallery has more than 1 slide.

testCases.title: Gallery supports up to 10 images
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Gallery has 10 or fewer slides.

testCases.title: Slide count matches thumbnail count
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Slide count matches thumbnail count.

testCases.title: Each slide contains an image or video element
steps: Verify each has img or video.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Each slide contains an image or video element.

testCases.title: Gallery counter shows current position out of total
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Counter shows N/M format.

testCases.title: Gallery badge indicates video presence
steps: Verify gallery has video badge or video element.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Gallery has video badge or video element.

testCases.title: Video badge text contains Video keyword
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Badge text contains 'video' keyword.

testCases.title: Clicking video badge opens video player
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Video player opens after clicking play/preview.

testCases.title: Video plays without page reload
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: URL unchanged after clicking play.

testCases.title: Video player element is present after clicking play
testCases.preconditions: User clicked play.
expectedResults: Video/iframe element is visible.

testCases.title: Gallery slides use aspect ratio CSS class
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: First slide class contains 'aspect'.

testCases.title: All slides share same aspect ratio class
steps: Get aspect class from first slide.
Verify all slides have same class.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: All slides share the same aspect ratio class.

testCases.title: Main image loads within acceptable time
steps: Measure time for main image to attach.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: Main image loads within acceptable time.

testCases.title: All slide images have valid src
steps: Verify each image has valid URL src.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the product page.
expectedResults: All slide images have valid URL src.

testCases.title: Gallery renders on mobile viewport
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile (375x667).
expectedResults: Gallery is visible on mobile.

testCases.title: Gallery renders on tablet viewport
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to tablet (768x1024).
expectedResults: Gallery is visible on tablet.

testCases.title: No horizontal overflow on mobile
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile.
expectedResults: No horizontal overflow on mobile.

testCases.title: Thumbnails remain visible on mobile
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile.
expectedResults: Thumbnails remain visible on mobile.
